hero.descripcion: Full Stack Developer with over 7 years of experience in software development, specialized in Java Spring Boot and React.js. Solid track record in microservices architectures, REST APIs, relational databases, and cloud environments (AWS, Azure). Proven experience in complex integration systems, data automation, and Linux infrastructure support.
